title: agrostis capillaris subsp. repens
intro: Agrostis capillaris subsp. repens, also known as creeping bent or creeping bentgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Agrostis capillaris subsp. repens include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and anti-cancer agent. Agrostis capillaris subsp. repens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and skin problems.
